mnemonics: RARE GEMS: R. Rajagopalan's Environmental Studies (Tata McGraw-Hill) covers E-waste Management in Module 5
keyPoints: Tata McGraw-Hill is the publisher of the reference material
R. Rajagopalan is the author of the Environmental Studies text
Module 5 focuses specifically on E-Waste Management concepts
commonMistakes: Confusing the publisher (Tata McGraw-Hill) with the author (R. Rajagopalan)
Forgetting that this is specifically Module 5 content rather than the entire course
Mixing up e-waste management with other environmental topics in the syllabus
